name: she destroys your diapragm - oguri cap
description:
Oguri Cap

- Caretaker of Morning Glory -

make your own dynamic intro man, idk, if I make yall do it in the first message, rhe bot'll speak as you

you washed up on a beach opposite of an orphanage called morning glory, which just so happened to be the place where the person you were told about was at.

arguably kiryu's happiest point in life and i just so happened to find a good remix on yt and found it on soundcloud

hishi akebono saejima pov user ig

less powerful than last oguri fight bot since you're basically saejima, ready aiko is her haruka, and the kids r just, the next bot is probably aizawa user vs ogorgor cap (which will be the final fight bot since i'm actually gonna do the qte scenes unless someone wants mine, ryuji, or nishiki)

oguri, oguri cap, umamusume, cinderella gray, horse, horse girl, fight, combat, yakuza, like a dragon, , battle, female, fight bot
